title: wolfhsm: no RustCrypto trait implementations
description: EccP256Key, Ed25519Key, RsaKey do not implement signature::Signer / signature::Verifier from the signature crate. Key types cannot be used anywhere that accepts a generic signer, and the crate is isolated from the RustCrypto ecosystem. At minimum: Ed25519Key should impl signature::Signer<ed25519::Signature> and EccP256Key should impl signature::Signer<p256::ecdsa::Signature>. This likely depends on resolving the &mut Client ergonomics issue first (issue wolfssl-rs-Nxx) since Signer::sign takes &self, not &self + &mut Client).
